decks.notes: This deck revolves around aggressive gameplay using Cloud, Midgar Mercenary as the commander. It includes a variety of low-cost creatures and equipment cards to quickly build a strong board presence and attack the opponent efficiently. The deck also features cards that provide protection for your creatures, disruption for your opponent, and ways to control the battlefield. With a focus on speed and aggression, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory in a 1 vs 1 Duel Commander format.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a variety of spells and abilities, leveraging Tasigur, the Golden Fang as the commander to outvalue opponents. With a mix of disruption, card advantage, and versatile answers, the deck aims to manipulate the board state to its advantage while digging through the library for key pieces. This includes removal spells like Fatal Push and Dismember, countermagic such as Force of Negation and Cryptic Command, and card draw/filtering options like Brainstorm and Ponder. By constantly adapting to the opponent's strategy and disrupting their game plan, the deck aims to maintain control and ultimately overpower the opponent with a combination of card advantage and strategic decision-making.

The deck focuses on a control strategy, utilizing counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to disrupt the opponent's game plan and maintain control of the board. Hidetsugu and Kairi serve as the commanders, providing a strong presence on the battlefield and enabling powerful plays. The deck includes a variety of versatile cards such as Cryptic Command, Snapcaster Mage, and Demonic Tutor to adapt to different situations and answer threats effectively. With a mix of efficient removal, permission spells, and powerful finishers like Damnation and Expropriate, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent, ultimately securing victory through superior control and resource management.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game by utilizing counterspells, removal, and card advantage to disrupt the opponent's game plan while slowly building your own resources and advantage. Tivit, Seller of Secrets acts as the commander, providing card draw and an additional win condition. The deck includes a variety of counterspells like Counterspell, Force of Negation, and Mana Leak, along with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Toxic Deluge. It also features cards that generate card advantage such as Teferi, Time Raveler and Snapcaster Mage. By efficiently managing resources and disrupting the opponent's strategy, the deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory.

The deck focuses on aggressive play with Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd as the commander. It includes a mix of efficient creatures with abilities that disrupt opponents, such as Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Drannith Magistrate. The deck also features removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Skyclave Apparition to deal with opposing threats. The main strategy is to apply pressure on the opponent while controlling the board with cards like Recruiter of the Guard and Stoneforge Mystic to search for key pieces. The deck aims to maintain a strong board presence and outpace the opponent, leveraging the commander's abilities to maintain tempo and overwhelm the opponent in the 1 vs 1 format.

This control deck focuses on countering and removing threats from the opponent while generating card advantage through cantrips and card draw spells. Elminster serves as the commander, providing access to powerful control cards in Azorius colors. The deck includes a variety of counterspells, removal spells, and board wipes to control the game and protect Elminster. It also features cards like Snapcaster Mage to recur instants and sorceries, and Mystic Sanctuary to reuse important spells. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by maintaining control of the board and hand while slowly grinding out advantages through superior card quality and efficient answers.
